title: Reimagining the mouse pointer with AI
summary: Google DeepMind has developed an AI-enhanced mouse pointer that understands what it points at and the contextual significance of UI elements. The system modernizes the pointer interface with new AI-powered capabilities while maintaining its fundamental role in computer workflows.
